name: Vvveb With Mysql
tagline: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.
description:
Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

Docs: https://docs.vvveb.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  vvveb:
    image: vvveb/vvvebcms:latest
    volumes:
      - vvveb-data:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - DB_ENGINE=mysqli
      - DB_HOST=mysql
      - DB_USER=ub05ff2c9c4
      - DB_PASSWORD=03822bef7157aab8824b40726b182bca
      - DB_NAME=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-vvveb}
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42137:80
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.4.2
    volumes:
      - vvveb-mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=0afa798dbb78e6c14e9746f2fccb741f
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-vvveb}
      - MYSQL_USER=ub05ff2c9c4
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=03822bef7157aab8824b40726b182bca
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mysqladmin
        - ping
        - -h
        - 127.0.0.1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  vvveb-data: null
  vvveb-mysql-data: null
